creator: aa8vb@nc.rr.com
text:
Update of OpenDX port to version 4.1.3.  This version fixes
        many problems encountered on FreeBSD and incorporates most of the
        FreeBSD patches.

Fix: I've just included the full port since almost all of it
	changed except the description.  Basically, remove all of the
	existing patches, add in the few in this package, and update 
        Makefile, distinfo, and pkg-plist.

        I'm also including it in uuencoded form as shar can break on
        some files.
